tier: Tier 7.6d - Reduced-Feature Planning Generalization / Task Repair
claim: Tier 7.6d repairs the Tier 7.6c feature-alignment blocker by rerunning the planning diagnostic with direct raw keys hidden and aliased/coarse features only. The reduced-feature signal is supported on 4/5 families, including the two prior weak families, and authorizes a promotion/compact-regression gate.
caveat: Reduced-feature local diagnostic only; not a promoted planning mechanism, not public usefulness proof, not a new baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
